loop1.title: Tap Position Optimization
loop1.note: Showing voltage average as a proxy for tap position, as a dedicated tap position column is not measured by this meter.

loop1.title: Voltage Regulation Timeline
loop1.note: Showing average bus voltage and tap position history. Tap position is not directly measured by this meter; the voltage axis is used as a proxy for the regulator's state. Band limits and setpoints are derived from statutory voltage deviation parameters.

loop1.title: Recent Tap Changes
loop1.note: Showing active power as a proxy for tap position — tap position is not directly measured by this meter.

loop1.title: Tap Activity & Wear
loop1.note: Showing active power total as a proxy for tap activity counts — the meter does not log a dedicated tap counter column.
